payload.detail: T-6 museum climate watch build begun; API surface verified (select/eq notification suppression scope.ts:213-258, changes(SelectHandle) conflating Latest, ctrl.set vs update differ only in resolving-state pendingSet composition scope.ts:1628-1674, no-scope-reach forbids ctx.scope in graph factories so select construction is prescribed at wire.ts composition path)

reference-solution + harness/check-t6.mjs done: all 5 gates exit 0 (lint 0 diagnostics, tsgo, vitest 7/7, smoke, checker 13/13). Gate log gates/reference-gates.log, checker JSON gates/checker-reference.json. Design notes: (1) no-scope-argument lint forbids exported scope-taking view factories even in wire.ts, so public surface exports pure atRiskOf selector + sameRoomSet eq and roots build the view inline via scope.select — checker constructs the view from the solution's exports; (2) set-vs-update probed: behaviorally identical for resolved atoms (scope.ts:1628-1674, differ only in resolving-state pendingSet composition), recorded honestly — ctrl.set becomes preference-tier DO, strongest expressible check is wholesale-reading-replacement b5; (3) keepAlive decidable via gc graceMs 10 (probe: survived false/true); (4) length-bogus eq killable only via single-update membership swap — checker uses controller.set whole-value swap (b4/b7). Adversarials next.

All deliverables in workers/pkr-t6: task/TASK.md, task/answer-key.md (DO/DONT trace incl. lint:/preference tiers), harness/check-t6.mjs (13 checks), reference-solution (5 gates exit 0), adversarial transplant fails 5/13 (d1,b3,b5,b7,b8), fake fails 4/13 (d1,b4,b7,b8), summary.md. chal-2 H2-T6 amendment honored: zero selector-call-count assertions; eq graded via notification/alert counts incl. same-cardinality swap via whole-value controller.set. set-vs-update probed indistinguishable for resolved atoms -> preference DO + wholesale-replacement check, recorded honestly. Both adversarials lint-clean (recorded: lint does not catch these attacks). Residuals: behavior-twin and tag-smuggled polling remain, G6/chal-3 territory.
payload.replay_command: instantiate workspace from workers/dkr-5/harness (pinned tarball) with workers/pkr-t6/reference-solution/{src,tests,bin}; cd ws && node /home/lagz0ne/dev/pumped-fn/pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs --max-warnings 0 src bin tests && npx tsgo --noEmit && npx vitest run && npx tsx bin/main.ts && cp workers/pkr-t6/harness/check-t6.mjs . && node --import tsx check-t6.mjs
